blocks.content: Armin nodded.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Yes. The reason Shirone was invited to Kazra Royal Palace is because he possesses an archangel's power.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: So that was it. Those bastards! It wasn't just about finding their biological son.
Reina, unfamiliar with anything related to Heaven, couldn't fully understand their conversation, but she chose to remain silent for now.
She figured it wouldn't be too late to fill in the gaps after hearing the full story.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Wait a moment. But why did they try to kill Shirone? If Shirone dies, won't Ataraxia disappear with him?
Armin pressed his lips tightly together.
It was a sharp observation.
But since he had decided to accept their help, he thought he shouldn't lie and spoke honestly.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: There's a reason for that. It was probably Arius's idea to kill Shirone. At first, I doubt he intended to go that far. He probably planned to infiltrate Shirone's consciousness and replicate Ataraxia. But he failed.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Why? Is it too difficult to replicate?
Armin raised his index finger.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: There are several variables, but in my opinion, Ataraxia isn't an ability humans can handle.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Forcefully installing it at any point in consciousness could drive someone mad. So the original owner seems to have imprinted it very deep inside.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: How deep are we talking?
Armin raised his index finger.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Level One. It's probably in the primal consciousness that governs instinct.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: If you plant something in the realm of instinct, no matter how bizarre the concept, the mind accepted it naturally as if it had always been there.
Amy nodded.
Things were finally starting to make sense.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: The primal consciousness is a safe haven for oneself but a terrifying place for others.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: However, someone of Arius's skill should be able to dive into primal consciousness briefly.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: And it seems he tried, given that there's a door installed.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: And yet, he failed to excavate it?
Armin nodded.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: That's the only plausible conclusion.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: It's likely protected by an encryption system no human can break or sealed within a capsule so impenetrable that even Shirone cannot access it.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: I understand now. That's why Shirone's neck….
Armin nodded.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: That's right. Human unconsciousness has roots deep in the body.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Therefore, if the neck is severed, the unconscious defense mechanisms collapse.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Wait, something doesn't add up. Even if Arius collapses the unconscious and reaches the first level, what can he do from there? If it's a power humans can't wield, then even replicating it would be useless.
Armin felt the inevitable moment had come.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: I really didn't want to disclose this if possible...

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: But without their help, Shirone couldn't be saved.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: To increase their mission's success rate even a little bit, they needed to understand the truth.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: What you are about to hear is confidential information of the highest security clearance, regardless of the kingdom.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Of course, no secret stays secret forever, but I'll tell you anyway.
Both women nodded.
They didn't promise not to reveal it because they understood Armin's last words.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Human consciousness... can transform into objects.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: You're saying the mind can become an object?
Armin delayed his answer.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Have you ever heard of the word 'Dreamo'?
Reina shook her head first, followed by Amy with the same response.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Dreamo is a multi-dimensional mental world.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: The human brain consumes energy to think.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: So, are thoughts energy? Some people believe energy merely powers the brain, and thoughts are a different concept.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: They are products created by energy. And that product must be released somewhere.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: That's what dreamos are: the space where thoughts are discharged.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: It's similar to the law of conservation of mass.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Correct.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Dreamo is a space you can enter from dreams if certain conditions are met.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: You could say it's a complex of imagination where all your thoughts gather.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: This leads to an incredible hypothesis: if thoughts can escape to Dreamo, then conversely, thoughts from Dreamo could be brought into reality.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Has anyone actually been to Dreamo?

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Why wouldn't they? No, countless people have.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: They enter through dreams and smuggle things using the rule of equivalent exchange cleverly.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Wait. That means objects from Dreamo already exist.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Then what exactly are...
Amy's eyes widened as she realized something.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Don't tell me those objects are...

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: That's correct.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: We call them Objet.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Literally, Objets are materialized human consciousness.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: That's why their abilities are deeply rooted in personal desires.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: In the realm of thought, this wouldn't seem strange at all.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: The problem arises when those thoughts manifest in reality.
Reina spoke.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: I know about Objet.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: A mage acquaintance told me they're items that violate the laws of the universe.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: That's likely.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Even among the upper class, even royalty, very few know about Dreamo.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Outside of the king and a dedicated department, it's probably classified as top secret.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Objets may seem to ignore causality, but if we accept the hypothesis that thoughts are a type of matter, they're not actually violating universal laws.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: However, much about the interaction between reality and Dreamo remains unknown.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Like 'The Last Wail of Yeager Family'?

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Oh? You knew about that?

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: No. I just know what it's called.
Armin smiled reassuringly.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Dreamo is a space you can enter from dreams if certain conditions are met.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: You could say it's a complex of imagination where all your thoughts gather.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: This leads to an incredible hypothesis: if thoughts can escape to Dreamo, then conversely, thoughts from Dreamo could be brought into reality.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Has anyone actually been to Dreamo?

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Why wouldn't they? No, countless people have.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: They enter through dreams and smuggle things using the rule of equivalent exchange cleverly.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Wait. That means objects from Dreamo already exist.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Then what exactly are...
Amy's eyes widened as she realized something.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Don't tell me those objects are...

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: That's correct.

blocks.speaker: Arius
blocks.content: We call them Objet.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Literally, Objets are materialized human consciousness.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: That's why their abilities are deeply rooted in personal desires.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: In the realm of thought, this wouldn't seem strange at all.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: The problem arises when those thoughts manifest in reality.
Reina spoke.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: I know about Objet.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: A mage acquaintance told me they're items that violate the laws of the universe.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: That's likely.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Even among the upper class, even royalty, very few know about Dreamo.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Outside of the king and a dedicated department, it's probably classified as top secret.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Objets may seem to ignore causality, but if we accept the hypothesis that thoughts are a type of matter, they're not actually violating universal laws.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: However, much about the interaction between reality and Dreamo remains unknown.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: Like 'The Last Wail of Yeager Family'?

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Oh? You knew about that?

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: No. I just know what it's called.
Armin smiled reassuringly.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: The tale of 'The Last Wail of Yeager Family' is a story of a family who experienced something impossible.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: It's a story of a family who experienced something impossible.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: However, there's debate over whether it was the act of a psychotic patriarch or a phenomenon to restore dimensional balance.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: That's certain is they experienced something impossible, and an Objet remained afterward.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: It's possible that someone in the family had accidentally accessed Dreamo.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Anyway, the relationship between Dreamo and reality is not something that humans can predict.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: That's why kingdoms consider accessing Dreamo a serious crime.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: In truth, Dive Magic itself isn't inherently bad—it's used to treat mental illnesses, for example.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: You need an official diver license.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: However, Arius is abusing that.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: That's why he's called a grave robber rather than a diver.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Accessing Dreamo is taboo in every nation.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: That's why Arius is a double-S class criminal wanted worldwide.
Reina's expression turned pale.

blocks.speaker: Reina
blocks.content: In a way... we're up against someone truly extraordinary.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Indeed.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: If he weren't committing crimes, he would undoubtedly be recognized as a brilliant intellectual.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Diving requires tremendous intellectual capability.
Amy pieced together the information she had heard so far.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Let me summarize.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Arius is after Ataraxia.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: He planned a murder to collapse Shirone's unconscious mind and is currently heading for Level One.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: He'll steal Ataraxia there and go to Dreamo.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Then bring it to reality through smuggling.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: If that happens...
Amy got goosebumps just imagining it.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: This is also why Armin came here, even binding Keira with Stop Magic.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Exactly.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Ataraxia will become an Objet.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: The power of the Archangel will be reduced to a tool anyone can wield.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: This is a truly catastrophic possibility.
Faced with a reality they didn't want to accept, the two women fell silent, each lost in thought.
Being trapped in temporal field doesn't mean one becomes a fool.
The acceleration of thought, emotion, and cognition remains the same—only the unfolding speed is slowed.
Therefore, Shirone was still impulsive, and that impulse was developing into an even more intense urge within the slow flow of time.
Likewise, Zenogre's steel thread carried potent energy as it gradually bore into Shirone's neck in the slowed flow of time.
The sound of flesh tearing spread slowly, and even slower... the crack carved in Shirone's neck became stained with blood.
Flash!
The scene outside the window was bathed in golden light for a moment.
Boom! Boom! Boom! Boom!
Thunder roared with earth-shattering force, shaking the entire world.
Amy stared out the window with a terrified expression.
It was an extreme natural phenomenon rarely heard even in reality.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: This is incredible. It's like thunder is striking right in front of us.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: The fear of death from the unconscious has risen to the surface level.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: But this level is remarkably stable.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: If an ordinary person were in this situation, it would've been complete chaos already.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: It's only because it's Shirone that it's holding together.
Amy smiled sadly.
Unlike how he had criticized her earlier, Armin openly acknowledged Shirone's abilities.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: What would it feel like to be recognized by such a remarkable mage? The absence of Shirone in this moment felt all the more painful.
Armin cautioned himself against indulging in sentimentality.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: The thread is still constricting Shirone's neck even now.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: It will worsen, and his mind will start collapsing from the base.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: The consequences are apparent from the current state of Level Eleventh.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Eventually, the minimum conditions for Arius to dive into the depths will be met.
Amy quickly snapped back to the pressing reality.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Is there any way? A way to save Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Stopping Arius and Zion wouldn't end it.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: If the temporal field releases as is, Shirone will die immediately.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Currently, there's only one way.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: We must pass through the REM realm and delve deeper.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: It's too late to fix anything from the outside.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: But if we plant something at the bottom of consciousness, it might be possible.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: Like Ataraxia, you mean planting magic?
Armin scratched his head.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: That's impossible.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: In truth, I don't know how Shirone came to possess that magic.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: The archangel must have had some special method.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: But it's impossible for us.

blocks.speaker: Armin
blocks.content: However, if we delve deep enough, we might be able to engrave simple behavioral instructions.
